description_long: This is a large, open-frame bookcase featuring a minimalist industrial design with four evenly spaced wooden shelves supported by a black metal framework. The shelves are rectangular and appear to be made of dark-stained wood, providing ample horizontal storage space. The frame consists of thin, vertical and diagonal metal rods, giving the structure both stability and a lightweight appearance. The base is a solid black platform, possibly metal or wood, with a subtle yellow accent line near the bottom edge. The open sides and back make the bookcase accessible from the front and allow for visibility of items placed on the shelves. Its overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for urban interiors such as lofts, offices, or contemporary retail spaces.
description: A large, open-frame bookcase with four dark wooden shelves and a black metal structure, featuring a solid black base with a yellow accent. The design is minimalist and industrial, ideal for modern urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile and the depth of the four wooden shelves supported by the thin black metal frame.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full width of the bookcase, all four shelves, and the solid black base with a yellow accent line.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, highlighting the slim depth and shelf arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open structure and the alignment of the shelves and base.
